video.title: Synthetic Agronomist Field Walk: Sensor Drift

segments.text: In the field, the cheap probes drifted after two foggy nights, which the sponsored case study did not mention.
segments.speaker: agronomist

segments.text: This might be wrong, but local salinity may explain the yield bump more than the sensor software.
segments.speaker: agronomist

segments.text: Water savings can happen, but the number depends on soil and maintenance discipline.
segments.speaker: agronomist
